## `./Makefile`

### Environment Variables:

`MK_DRY_RUN=true|false` print commands instead of running them

### Wrappers:

`check`: `test -> build` run tests then build

### Go:

`test` run all tests
`build` build the binary into ./dist

### Docs:

`render-templates` render *.repo.tpl onto the repo (makefile.agents.md)
